name: mixed_ruby_bouten

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.1+§6.2 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] An explicit ruby ｜青梅《おうめ》 and a later forward bouten both reference 青梅 independently; the ruby reading and the bouten target do not interfere. Offsets from the §3 byte model. Serialize canonicalises right-side ruby to the BARE form (the explicit ｜ is dropped) per ADR 0003 §6.1 / ADR 0002: ｜ is emitted only when a bare 《reading》 would re-parse to a different base; here every base is an all-kanji run whose preceding char is non-base (line start / 　 / の), so the bare form re-parses identically.

source: ｜青梅《おうめ》には［＃「青梅」に傍点］という街道がある。

expected.html: 青梅(おうめ)には青梅という街道がある。
expected.serialize: 青梅《おうめ》には［＃「青梅」に傍点］という街道がある。
